who: HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month
offer: For HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month, inaccurate tracking causes payroll discrepancies. We monitor timesheets and alert HR ops instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inaccurate tracking of employee hours leading to payroll errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR operations help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR operations with demo video
Community forums for sharing HR tools
try_it: Let users try anomaly detection and user-friendly dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
